query:
INSERT INTO card_quantity (set_code, collector_number, language_code, foil, user_id, quantity, purchase_price)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
            ON CONFLICT(set_code, collector_number, language_code, foil, user_id)
                DO UPDATE
                SET quantity       = $6,
                    purchase_price = $7
